title: Zesty Field
description: A Zesty.io field defines a single data attribute within a content model, specifying its type, validation rules, and display settings.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the field.

contentModelZUID.description: The content model ZUID this field belongs to.

name.description: The programmatic name of the field.

label.description: The display label for the field.

datatype.description: The data type of the field (e.g., text, textarea, wysiwyg_basic, images, date, number, link, internal_link, one_to_one, one_to_many).

sort.description: The sort order of the field within the model.

settings.description: Additional field settings and validation rules.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the field was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the field was last updated.
